title: Senior Software Engineer - Cisco India South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cisco India South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cisco India South Asia Partners in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cisco India South Asia Partners:
Cisco India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India South Asia Partners!
